claims.claim: In a controlled Top-1 sparse-regression MoE proxy (3→6 expert expansion, 10 seeds, 24k train / 12k test samples), retrieval-conditioned expert expansion (RCEE) reduced test MSE by 70.4% relative to the 3-expert base router and by 43.3% relative to a 6-expert utility-clustered expansion baseline when retrieval metadata accuracy was 0.90.
